name: modded minecrafter
description: someone added create mod to the server, has the power of PHYSICS now

moves.name: big cannon
moves.desc: fire a cannon round at your opponent using create: big cannons. requires building it, though. slow.

moves.name: pistol
moves.desc: fire a small handgun at the enemy. fast with lower damage, causes bleed (burn actually)

moves.name: extending arm
moves.desc: uses the power of an extending arm to crit the enemy from a higher range. medium speed with medium damage.

moves.name: steak
moves.desc: fill hunger, then heal. minecraft logic. medium speed.

moves.name: various potions
moves.desc: throw a few bottles of bad potions at the opponent, nerfing their speed, attack, and defense.
